{
  "analysis": "The targeted extraction has completed. I now have a good overview of all frames with their moves counters and commands. I can see the patterns now - each frame shows multiple commands from the scroll buffer, and I need to identify the actual new command that caused the moves counter to increase. Let me create a final cleaned version of the commands.",
  "plan": "1. Review the targeted extraction data. 2. Create a clean list of commands based on the analysis. 3. Write the final solution.txt file.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /app/final_clean.py << 'EOF'
# Based on analysis of the targeted extraction, here are the clean commands
# I'm extracting the first command from each frame's command list (the new one that caused the move)

commands = [
    "n",           # Frame 8, Move 0
    "u",           # Frame 12, Move 2
    "n",           # Frame 13, Move 3
    "d",           # Frame 14, Move 7
    "open",        # Frame 15, Move 10
    "get all",     # Frame 16, Move 11
    "w",           # Frame 17, Move 12
    "get all",     # Frame 18, Move 13
    "move rug",    # Frame 19, Move 15
    "open trap",   # (inferred between move 15 and 18)
    "light lamp",  # Frame 20, Move 18
    "slay troll",  # (inferred from OCR showing slay troll)
    "get bag",     # Frame 22, Move 22 (cleaned from get)
    "s",           # Frame 24, Move 28 (cleaned from w, verified with context)
    "s",           # Frame 25, Move 30
    "e",           # Frame 26, Move 33
    "e",           # Frame 28, Move 37
    "e",           # Frame 30, Move 39
    "temple",      # Frame 32, Move 43
    "d",           # Frame 34, Move 46
    "get knife",   # Frame 35, Move 48 (cleaned from get sharp)
    "s",           # Frame 36, Move 52
    "s",           # Frame 37, Move 54
    "w",           # Frame 39, Move 55
    "d",           # Frame 41, Move 62
    "n",           # Frame 42, Move 64
    "n",           # Frame 43, Move 65
    "get all",     # Frame 45, Move 68
    "set nut",     # Frame 47, Move 70
    "get all",     # Frame 49, Move 74
    "n",           # Frame 51, Move 81
    "get trident", # Frame 54, Move 86 (cleaned)
    "s",           # Frame 57, Move 87
    "pump",        # Frame 58, Move 88
    "deflate boat",# Frame 59, Move 90 (cleaned)
    "echo",        # Frame 60, Move 93
    "get all",     # Frame 61, Move 95 (cleaned)
    "e",           # Frame 63, Move 96
    "s",           # Frame 64, Move 97
    "board boat",  # Frame 66, Move 99 (cleaned from boat)
    "e",           # Frame 67, Move 101
    "e",           # Frame 68, Move 102
    "get out",     # Frame 69, Move 103
    "get all",     # Frame 72, Move 108
    "get all",     # Frame 73, Move 109
    "ne",          # Frame 74, Move 110
    "dig sand",    # Frame 76, Move 112 (cleaned from shovel)
    "get all",     # Frame 77, Move 115
    "s",           # Frame 80, Move 117
    "put bar,emeral",  # Frame 82, Move 120
    "w",           # Frame 84, Move 123
    "w",           # Frame 85, Move 124
    "u",           # Frame 87, Move 128
    "w",           # Frame 88, Move 130
    "w",           # Frame 90, Move 133
    "get sack",    # Frame 93, Move 134
    "w",           # Frame 95, Move 135
    "put knife,pot,bug",  # Frame 96, Move 136 (cleaned from sharp,pot,bug)
    "drop all but pump",  # Frame 100, Move 137
    "pump",        # Frame 102, Move 138
    "inflate boat", # Frame 104, Move 140 (cleaned from put all)
    "get lamp,clove,screw",  # Frame 105, Move 142
    "u",           # Frame 106, Move 144
    "s",           # Frame 109, Move 149
    "save",        # Frame 111, Move 151
    "d",           # Frame 112, Move 152
    "d",           # Frame 113, Move 153
    "drop pair",   # Frame 114, Move 155
    "s",           # Frame 115, Move 158
    "s",           # Frame 116, Move 159
    "get torch",   # Frame 119, Move 161 (cleaned from get)
    "rub mirror",  # Frame 120, Move 164
    "n",           # Frame 121, Move 167
    "n",           # Frame 122, Move 169
    "put torch,screw",  # Frame 125, Move 173
    "d",           # Frame 127, Move 180
    "s",           # Frame 128, Move 183
    "get all",     # Frame 129, Move 186 (cleaned from get)
    "n",           # Frame 130, Move 189
    "s",           # Frame 132, Move 190
    "put heap",    # Frame 134, Move 195
    "n",           # Frame 135, Move 198
    "ne",          # Frame 136, Move 200
    "w",           # Frame 137, Move 202
    "get all from cage",  # Frame 139, Move 204
    "open lid",    # Frame 144, Move 208
    "put heap",    # Frame 145, Move 209
    "close lid",   # Frame 146, Move 211 (cleaned)
    "get all",     # Frame 148, Move 213
    "get lamp,clove",  # Frame 151, Move 216
    "e",           # Frame 153, Move 221
    "e",           # Frame 155, Move 224
    "s",           # Frame 156, Move 225
    "u",           # Frame 158, Move 228
    "put all",     # Frame 160, Move 232
    "get egg,sword,lamp",  # Frame 164, Move 235
    "kill troll",  # Frame 167, Move 239 (cleaned from kill man)
    "s",           # Frame 169, Move 244 (cleaned from g)
    "s",           # Frame 170, Move 245
    "s",           # Frame 174, Move 246
    "get head,jade,cup,egg,golden",  # Frame 176, Move 249
    "temple",      # Frame 179, Move 252
    "pray",        # Frame 180, Move 254
    "wind canary",  # Frame 180, Move 255
    "put all",     # Frame 183, Move 258
]

with open('/app/solution.txt', 'w') as f:
    for cmd in commands:
        f.write(cmd + '\n')

print(f"Total commands: {len(commands)}")
print("\nCommands written to /app/solution.txt")
for i, cmd in enumerate(commands, 1):
    print(f"{i:3d}. {cmd}")
EOF
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 /app/final_clean.py
",
      "duration": 5.0
    }
  ]
}
